recommendations.title: Gummo
recommendations.overview: Teenagers Solomon and Tummler kill time in Xenia, Ohio, a small town that has never recovered from the tornado that ravaged the community in the 1970s.

recommendations.title: Julien Donkey-Boy
recommendations.overview: Undiagnosed, untreated and generally untethered schizophrenic Julien lives with his pregnant younger sister, anorexic aspiring wrestler brother, sympathetic grandmother, and severely depressed and abusive German father.

recommendations.title: Mister Lonely
recommendations.overview: In Paris, a young American working as a Michael Jackson lookalike meets Marilyn Monroe, who invites him to her commune in Scotland, where she lives with Charlie Chaplin and her daughter, Shirley Temple.

recommendations.title: The Beach Bum
recommendations.overview: An irreverent comedy about the misadventures of Moondog, a rebellious stoner and lovable rogue who lives large.

recommendations.title: Trash Humpers
recommendations.overview: Follow a small group of elderly “Peeping Toms” through the shadows and margins of an unfamiliar world. Crudely documented by the participants themselves, we follow the debased and shocking actions of a group of true sociopaths the likes of which have

recommendations.title: Pitch Perfect
recommendations.overview: College student Beca knows she does not want to be part of a clique, but that's exactly where she finds herself after arriving at her new school. Thrust in among mean gals, nice gals and just plain weird gals, Beca finds that the only thing they have

recommendations.title: Another Gay Sequel: Gays Gone Wild!
recommendations.overview: Four university students head to Florida for spring break and enroll in a contest to see who can get the most sexual partners.

recommendations.title: Spring Breakdown
recommendations.overview: Three women in their thirties head to a popular Spring Break destination and try to relive the Spring Break they never had.

recommendations.title: The Hundred-Foot Journey
recommendations.overview: A story centered around an Indian family who moves to France and opens a restaurant across the street from a Michelin-starred French restaurant.

recommendations.title: WWE WrestleMania 36: Part 1
recommendations.overview: The first night of the 36th annual WrestleMania event being held at the WWE Performance Center in Orlando, Florida, hosted by former New England Patriots Tight End Rob Gronkowski.
